final:
module tcp_segmentation(
    input [7:0] segment_size,
    input [7:0] MSS,
    output reg segmentation_required
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (segment_size > MSS) 
            segmentation_required = 1'b1; // Segmentation is required
        else 
            segmentation_required = 1'b0; // No segmentation required
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (segment_size <= MSS) begin
        segmentation_required = 1'b1;
      end else begin
        segmentation_required = 1'b0;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
